title: Animal Action (W8 / EM-064)
description: The JSON an ANIMAL's model returns on an LLM-decision tick (not every tick — see world-model.md §W8 roll-for-activity). Distinct from the agent action protocol: animals are framed as critters that act impulsively and IN-CHARACTER, NOT to optimize. The toolset is intentionally UNDER-CONSTRAINED so the LLM may choose an absurd escalation (arson/steal_food). Parsed like the agent action (first valid JSON object; one retry; on failure the animal falls back to a reflex micro-behavior, never idles the loop). animal_thought is a short in-character line surfaced in the Animal Chaos Feed.

animal_thought.description: In-character thought (cat: aloof/mischievous; dog: excited/loyal). Surfaced in the chaos feed; truncated, never fails the turn.

target.description: agent_id whose snack is taken — comedic, moves NO credits (invariant 7)

examples.animal_thought: That tall wooden thing offends me. I shall knock it over.
A warm sunbeam. Nothing else matters.
FIRE? no — but the clock tower would look better as kindling.
BALL? STICK? PERSON? everything is the best thing!
